---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to the agent-aware keep-awake workflow
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What workflow or pain point is missing today?

## Proposed change

What should `awake` do?

## Why this belongs in awake

Explain why this is specifically useful for agent-driven Mac workflows, not just a generic utility feature.

## Alternatives considered

What do you do today instead?

## Extra context

Mockups, screenshots, command examples, or edge cases.
